moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Loom
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages are in full swing, with the Round of 16 matches concluding today and quarter-finals set to begin on July 9.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Who's making it to the quarter-finals? The World Cup is heating up, with huge matches happening now and the quarter-finals just days away!

angles.name: UK Team Focus
angles.copy: England secured their spot in the World Cup Round of 16! Can they go all the way to the quarter-finals and beyond?

moments.title: Wimbledon Enters Second Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 continue into their second week, with the tournament running until Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Tournament Update
angles.copy: It's the second week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to lift the trophies this Sunday?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Sunshine and tennis! Wimbledon's second week is here, meaning we're officially in peak strawberries and cream season.

moments.title: British Grand Prix Aftermath
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone wrapped up yesterday, July 5, with fans still buzzing from the weekend's high-octane action.

angles.name: Weekend Recap
angles.copy: What a weekend at Silverstone! Still reeling from the British Grand Prix? Tell us your favourite moment from the track.

angles.name: F1 Talk
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix delivered all the drama. Who was your standout driver of the weekend?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is currently the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week of July 5-11, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's official! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are at Number 1 with 'Rein Me In' on the UK Singles Chart this week. Have you heard it?

angles.name: New Music
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean holding strong at #1! What other tracks are you loving on this week's chart?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: Parts of the UK, especially London and the South East, are experiencing an ongoing heatwave with temperatures forecast to reach up to 34°C this week, lasting until at least July 12.

angles.name: Weather Update
angles.copy: Another week, another heatwave! Stay hydrated and keep cool as temperatures climb across the UK, reaching up to 34°C in some areas.

angles.name: Tips for Heat
angles.copy: Sun's out, thermometers are soaring! Remember to look out for vulnerable people and check on your pets during this prolonged hot spell.

moments.title: New Scottish Thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: The new six-part murder drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish Highlands, premieres on ITV and ITVX on July 12.

angles.name: New Drama Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for a chilling new drama! 'The Dark', a murder mystery set in the Scottish Highlands, lands on ITV and ITVX this Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Scottish Story
angles.copy: Intrigue in the Highlands! New crime series 'The Dark' starts this weekend, showcasing a dramatic Scottish backdrop.

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Reboot
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' is set to premiere on Netflix on July 9.

angles.name: Family TV
angles.copy: Nostalgia alert! A brand new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix this Thursday, July 9. Perfect for family viewing!

angles.name: What To Watch
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge? The classic 'Little House on the Prairie' gets a fresh take on Netflix this week.

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper and entrepreneur 50 Cent, born Curtis Jackson III, turns 51 today, July 6.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent! What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

angles.name: Music Throwback
angles.copy: Celebrating 50 Cent's 51st today! From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop', he's given us so many bangers.

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Keeble
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, turns 67 today, July 6.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Spandau Ballet's brilliant drummer, John Keeble! What's your top Spandau track?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to John Keeble! The beat behind some of the greatest 80s hits.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kate Nash
moments.blurb: English singer-songwriter Kate Nash, known for hits like 'Foundations', turns 39 today, July 6.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the fantastic Kate Nash! We're still singing along to 'Foundations'.

angles.name: Indie Pop Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Kate Nash's birthday today! A true indie pop icon who brought us so many memorable tunes.

moments.title: Courtney Love's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, turns 62 on July 9.

angles.name: Birthday Ahead
angles.copy: This Thursday, July 9, Courtney Love turns 62! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: A force of nature in music and beyond, Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday this week.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice, turns 80 on July 15.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: On July 15, the legendary Linda Ronstadt turns 80! Her incredible voice has graced so many genres.

angles.name: 70s Sounds
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt this week! A true icon of rock, country, and pop.

moments.title: Pembrokeshire Refinery Fire
moments.blurb: Emergency services are responding to a 'confined fire' involving a disused oil tanker at the former Impala Terminal in Milford Haven, Pembrokeshire, reported on Monday evening.

angles.name: Local News Update
angles.copy: Fire crews are at the scene of a 'confined fire' at the former Impala Terminal in Milford Haven. Residents are advised to stay clear.

angles.name: Safety Message
angles.copy: Important update for Milford Haven: Emergency services are dealing with a fire at the Impala Terminal. Please follow local guidance for safety.

moments.title: Swansea BID Re-elected
moments.blurb: Swansea Business Improvement District (BID) has been successfully re-elected for a record-breaking fifth consecutive term, continuing its work in the city centre.

angles.name: Swansea Positive News
angles.copy: Great news for Swansea city centre! Swansea BID has been re-elected for a fifth term, continuing their vital work supporting local businesses.

angles.name: Local Business
angles.copy: A huge vote of confidence for Swansea BID! What changes would you like to see in the city centre over their next term?

moments.title: Appeal After Fatal Exeter Collision
moments.blurb: Devon & Cornwall Police are appealing for witnesses and footage following a fatal road traffic collision on Pennsylvania Road in Exeter yesterday, July 5, involving a van and a motorcycle.

angles.name: Local News Update
angles.copy: Our thoughts are with those affected by yesterday's fatal collision on Pennsylvania Road, Exeter. Police are appealing for witnesses.

angles.name: Call for Information
angles.copy: If you have any information or dash-cam footage regarding the collision on Pennsylvania Road yesterday, please contact Devon & Cornwall Police, quoting log 622 of 5 July 2026.

moments.title: Exeter Summer Fest Continues
moments.blurb: Inclusive Exeter's Summer Fest 2026 continues, bringing community events across the city, including a Community Family Picnic at Cockington Country Park on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Community Event
angles.copy: Exeter's Summer Fest is in full swing! Join the Community Family Picnic at Cockington Country Park this Sunday, July 12, for fun and togetherness.

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Looking for family fun this weekend? Summer Fest has a Community Family Picnic coming up in Torquay on Sunday!
